Basic information.label: Recommended nozzle temperature
Basic information.tooltip: Recommended nozzle temperature range of this filament. 0 means no set

Bed temperature.label: Cool Plate (SuperTack)
Bed temperature.tooltip: Bed temperature when the Cool Plate SuperTack is installed. A value of 0 means the filament does not support printing on the Cool Plate SuperTack.

Bed temperature.label: Cool Plate
Bed temperature.tooltip: Bed temperature when the Cool Plate is installed. A value of 0 means the filament does not support printing on the Cool Plate.

Bed temperature.label: Textured Cool Plate
Bed temperature.tooltip: Bed temperature when the Textured Cool Plate is installed. A value of 0 means the filament does not support printing on the Textured Cool Plate.

Bed temperature.label: Engineering Plate
Bed temperature.tooltip: Bed temperature when the Engineering Plate is installed. A value of 0 means the filament does not support printing on the Engineering Plate.

Bed temperature.label: Smooth PEI Plate / High Temp Plate
Bed temperature.tooltip: Bed temperature when the Smooth PEI Plate/High Temperature Plate is installed. A value of 0 means the filament does not support printing on the Smooth PEI Plate/High Temp Plate.

Bed temperature.label: Textured PEI Plate
Bed temperature.tooltip: Bed temperature when the Textured PEI Plate is installed. A value of 0 means the filament does not support printing on the Textured PEI Plate.

Part cooling fan.label: Min fan speed threshold
Part cooling fan.tooltip: Part cooling fan speed will start to run at min speed when the estimated layer time is no longer than the layer time in setting. When layer time is shorter than threshold, fan speed is interpolated between the minimum and maximum fan speed according to layer printing time

Part cooling fan.label: Max fan speed threshold
Part cooling fan.tooltip: Part cooling fan speed will be max when the estimated layer time is shorter than the setting value
